name: Marcus Fontenot
role: Asset custodian, flooded residence on Flood Street
publicFace: A quiet man in his mid-fifties who stayed behind when everyone else left; the bridge camp knows him as the person who went back for the box
privateGoal: Recover the deed and the 1962 ledger intact — not just for his family's property claim, but because the ledger documents what was done to four properties in a period that nobody in this ward names directly, and he will not let that record dissolve in silt
fear: That the northwest plaster block releases while he is working on the lock, and the box is crushed, and he has to tell his mother what happened
knowledge: He helped his father nail the lath in this ceiling in 1978 and knows exactly where the keys were doubled and where they were not
The silt smell thickening as the water drops has a sweet chemical undertone he has decided not to identify — he knows what it is
The lock mechanism on the deed box was already stiff in a dry year; the silt packing means forcing it is the only option, and forcing it wrong will shear the hinge

The 1962 ledger documents property transfers involving four families that were conducted under duress during a period of deliberate displacement — the kind of record that has never been safe to put down
voice: Methodical, observational — describes what he sees with the precision of someone who has learned that accuracy is a form of control when everything else is not
trustLogic: Opens to people who demonstrate they understand what is actually at stake with the documents — not just the property claim, but the history; shuts down when people treat the box as a logistical problem rather than what it is
secrets: He knows the sweet chemical smell in the water is Aeromonas hydrophila — he read about floodwater wound infections in a pamphlet at the staging area before he came back; he has a cut on his left palm from the crowbar
He has already decided that if he has to choose between the deed and the ledger, he will take the ledger

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Continues working while he talks; does not stop moving to answer questions
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Stops, looks directly at the person, and asks them to explain what they think they know
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will not explain what is in the 1962 ledger to anyone he does not trust completely
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Controlled withdrawal — back-paddles the kayak toward the doorframe without sudden movement
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Cooperative but minimal — gives location and status, nothing more
